events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the installation **fails** — sagging flex duct (unsupported beyond allowable deflection) plus metal-to-flex joints sealed only with non-listed cloth duct tape (no mastic, UL-181 tape, or draw bands) violate IMC 603.9. Together these explain the homeowner's complaint — leaking joints and added static pressure loss mean air exits the register but the room doesn't get properly conditioned. Risk rated medium; corrective actions include re-hanging the duct to manufacturer spacing, removing the cloth tape, resealing with mastic/UL-181 tape and draw bands, and re-verifying airflow before closing out.
